repos.author: thunderbird
repos.name: thunderbolt
repos.description: AI You Control: Choose your models. Own your data. Eliminate vendor lock-in.
repos.summary: Thunderbird's experimental AI project enabling users to choose their own AI models with full data ownership, eliminating vendor lock-in.

repos.author: BasedHardware
repos.name: omi
repos.description: AI that sees your screen, listens to your conversations and tells you what to do
repos.summary: An AI wearable/app that sees your screen, listens to conversations, and provides contextual guidance and recommendations in real time.

repos.author: openai
repos.name: openai-agents-python
repos.description: A lightweight, powerful framework for multi-agent workflows
repos.summary: OpenAI's official Python framework for building multi-agent AI systems — lightweight, powerful, and designed for orchestrating multiple AI agents in production workflows.

repos.author: EvoMap
repos.name: evolver
repos.description: The GEP-Powered Self-Evolution Engine for AI Agents. Genome Evolution Protocol. | evomap.ai
repos.summary: A self-evolution engine for AI agents using Genome Evolution Protocol (GEP), enabling agents to iteratively improve themselves through genetic programming.

repos.author: deepseek-ai
repos.name: DeepGEMM
repos.description: DeepGEMM: clean and efficient FP8 GEMM kernels with fine-grained scaling
repos.summary: DeepSeek's clean and highly efficient FP8 GEMM (general matrix multiply) kernels with fine-grained scaling, optimized for high-performance deep learning.

repos.author: Lordog
repos.name: dive-into-llms
repos.description: 《动手学大模型Dive into LLMs》系列编程实践教程
repos.summary: A Chinese-language hands-on programming tutorial series for learning large language models (LLMs), with practical coding exercises and implementations.

repos.author: aaddrick
repos.name: claude-desktop-debian
repos.description: Claude Desktop for Debian-based Linux distributions
repos.summary: Community port of Anthropic's Claude Desktop app to Debian-based Linux distributions (Debian/Ubuntu/Linux Mint/etc.), enabling local AI assistant use.

repos.author: rustdesk
repos.name: rustdesk
repos.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.
repos.summary: A self-hostable open-source remote desktop application written in Rust — a popular TeamViewer alternative with full control over your data and infrastructure.

repos.author: SimoneAvogadro
repos.name: android-reverse-engineering-skill

repos.summary: A Claude Code skill that assists with Android app reverse engineering — helping analyze APK packages, decompile code, and trace app behavior.

repos.author: tractorjuice

repos.summary: A comprehensive enterprise architecture governance and vendor procurement toolkit covering frameworks, templates, and workflows for managing tech vendors and architecture decisions.
